narrative:
Precinct Avon City 2-D (precinct in Lorain County) has 738 registered voters, with 55.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.7%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.1 percentage points.
